name: EdwLoadMbrLifeEvtRunCycUpd_EE

text.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD, MIN(RUN_CYC_NO) AS RUN_CYC_NO FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE TRGT_SYS_CD = 'IDS' AND SUBJ_CD = 'MEMBER_LIFE_EVT' AND EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N' AND RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.BeginCycle} GROUP BY SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD) UPDATE prc SET prc.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'Y' FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC AS prc INNER JOIN cte ON prc.SRC_SYS_CD = cte.SRC_SYS_CD AND prc.SUBJ_CD = cte.SUBJ_CD AND prc.TRGT_SYS_CD = cte.TRGT_SYS_CD AND prc.RUN_CYC_NO >= cte.RUN_CYC_NO WHERE prc.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N'

Description:
*****************************************************************************************************************************************************************************
COPYRIGHT 2011 BLUE CROSS/BLUE SHIELD OF KANSAS CITY 


JOB NAME:     EdwLoadEcomMbrRunCycUpd

DESCRIPTION:  Update the P_RUN_CYC table EDW load indicator fields to show those records have been copied to the EDW.

MODIFICATIONS:
Developer                  Date              Project/Altiris #                                    Change Description                                       Development Project    Code Reviewer            Date Reviewed
-----------------------------      -----------------    -----------------------------------                       ---------------------------------------------------------             ----------------------------------   ---------------------------------    -------------------------   
Manasa Andru           2011-01-10     D4692-Proactive: 4489 - Alineo         Originally programmed                                    EnterpriseNewDevl       Steph Goddard            01/13/2011

Pooja Sunkara          2013-08-06      P5114                                                Rewrite in Parallel                                          EnterpriseWrhsDevl

Annotations:
Extract P_RUN_CYC records for IDS Ecomerce Membership with a value \"N\" in the  EDW_LOAD_IN where the run cycle is >= to the current run cycle used for extracting.
Set EDW_LOAD_IN to 'Y'
Update the P_RUN_CYC table to indicate source system data has been loaded to the EDW for each of the run cycles processed.
Job name:
EdwLoadMbrLifeEvtRunCycUpd_EE
